name: Calculateur Augmentation Salaire
desc: Calculez New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Exemple: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
description: Calculez New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Exemple: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
seo_description: Calculez New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Exemple: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscrip
example_label: Calculezting new salary after a 7.5% raise on current €2,monthly salary.
result_context: Your nuevo_salario of {nuevo_salario} reflects the raise. The incremento of {incremento} shows the monthly increase amount.
mistakes: Not considering tax implications of higher salary bracket
Forgetting to negotiate benefits alongside salary increase
Comparing percentage raises without considering inflation
